ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the employee (e.g., software engineer, senior software engineer) */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the employee */,
  "job_city" TEXT /* City where the employee is based */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the company */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "date_of_leaving" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_designation FOREIGN KEY ("designation") REFERENCES designations ("designation_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job responsibilities */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the designation */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* JSON array of required skills for the designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designations_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "board_10" TEXT /* Board of education for 10th standard */,
  "board_12" TEXT /* Board of education for 12th standard */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned by the employee (e.g., B.Tech/B.E.) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the degree (e.g., CS, EC) */,
  "college_state" TEXT /* State where the college is located */,
  "university" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "year_of_passing" INTEGER /* Year of passing the degree */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* Cumulative Grade Point Average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "computer_programming" INTEGER /* Proficiency in computer programming */,
  "electronics_and_semicon" INTEGER /* Proficiency in electronics and semiconductor */,
  "computer_science" INTEGER /* Proficiency in computer science */,
  "mechanical_engg" INTEGER /* Proficiency in mechanical engineering */,
  "electrical_engg" INTEGER /* Proficiency in electrical engineering */,
  "telecom_engg" INTEGER /* Proficiency in telecom engineering */,
  "civil_engg" INTEGER /* Proficiency in civil engineering */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the respective skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "conscientiousness" REAL /* Level of conscientiousness */,
  "agreeableness" REAL /* Level of agreeableness */,
  "extraversion" REAL /* Level of extraversion */,
  "neuroticism" REAL /* Level of neuroticism */,
  "openess_to_experience" REAL /* Level of openness to experience */,
  "resilience" REAL /* Level of resilience */,
  "adaptability" REAL /* Level of adaptability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personality_traits_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company where the job was held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the job was held */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Brief description of job responsibilities */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements in the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "rating" REAL /* Performance rating */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the training course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "certification_issued" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a certification was issued */,
  "certification_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "emp_dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-department assignment */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the department assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the department assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_departments_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_departments_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)
